title: Korr (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Barando.jpg|thumb|250px|Kel Dors]]

'''Korr''' was one of the most common surnames amongst [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dorians]], meaning "male ruler", or "king".<ref>''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> Also, it may refer to:

*The [[Ashes of Korr]], a debris belt.
*[[Asth-korr]], a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] throat hold.
*[[B'Korr]], a city in [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]].
*[[Drama Korr]], a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] merchant.
*[[Horace Korr]], a [[Corellia Times]] reporter.
*[[Jaden Korr]], a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].
*[[Vani Korr]], a female journalist.
*[[Zeerid Korr]], a male smuggler.
*[[Korr Sella]], emissary of the Resistance

Alternatively:

*[[Ryll kor|Kor]], a grade of [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]].
